queries.question: For every airline, provide the corresponding capacities of their fleets.
queries.sql: select airlines.name , fleets.capacity from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?capacity WHERE {
  ?airlines_fleets a :Airlines_Fleets .
  ?fleets a :Fleets .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasFleets ?fleets .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airlines p:name ?name .
  ?fleets p:capacity ?capacity .
}

queries.question: For every airline what are all of the fleet names and capacities?
queries.sql: select airlines.name , fleets.fleetname , fleets.capacity from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?fleetname ?capacity WHERE {
  ?airlines_fleets a :Airlines_Fleets .
  ?fleets a :Fleets .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasFleets ?fleets .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airlines p:name ?name .
  ?fleets p:fleetName ?fleetname .
  ?fleets p:capacity ?capacity .
}

queries.question: Show me the fleets that each airline owns.
queries.sql: SELECT Fleets.fleetName  from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id   GROUP BY Airlines_Fleets.fleetId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airlines_Fleets.airlineId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airlines)

queries.question: Show me the fleets that each airline owns.
queries.sql: select airlines.name , fleets.fleetname from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?fleetname WHERE {
  ?airlines_fleets a :Airlines_Fleets .
  ?fleets a :Fleets .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasFleets ?fleets .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?airlines_fleets p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?airlines p:name ?name .
  ?fleets p:fleetName ?fleetname .
}

queries.question: What are all the fleet names and capacities shown for every airline?
queries.sql: SELECT Fleets.fleetName, Fleets.capacity  from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id   GROUP BY Airlines_Fleets.fleetId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airlines_Fleets.airlineId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airlines)

queries.question: Show me the capacity that is common for all airlines' fleets.
queries.sql: SELECT Fleets.capacity  from Airlines_Fleets join Fleets on Airlines_Fleets.fleetId = Fleets.id join Airlines on Airlines_Fleets.airlineId = Airlines.id   GROUP BY Airlines_Fleets.fleetId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Airlines_Fleets.airlineId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Airlines)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What capacities do the fleets associated with each airline have?
What are all the fleet names and capacities shown for every airline?
Show me the fleets that each airline owns.
